index.contact_desc: From local escapes to far-flung adventures, find what makes you happy anytime, anywhere
index.we_make_2: Your Stay Easy at Suite Park
index.we_make_desc: Enjoy a unique experience at Suite Park Hotel, where comfort meets elegance. Our hotel offers the perfect blend of relaxation and luxury—making every stay unforgettable.
index.newsletter_desc: Welcome to Suite Park, Where step beyond the ordinary and enter the realm of unparalleled sophistication at Suite Park. We curate an experience reserved for those who recognize and appreciate true excellence. This is where architectural grandeur meets personalized artistry in service
index.join_newsletter: Sign up to our newsletter to receive latest news.
index.aboutus_desc: From local escapes to far-flung adventures, find what makes you happy anytime, anywhere
index.who_we_are_desc: Suite Park is your elegant escape in Jeddah’s Al-Shati District. With inviting rooms and suites, a friendly team available around the clock, and a prime location near the Corniche and city highlights, we make business trips and weekend breaks equally relaxing.
index.our_suite_park_desc: Our mission is to create a calm, design-led stay in Jeddah’s Al-Shati, where guests are looked after from check-in to check-out. By combining friendly, proactive service with well-crafted spaces, we remove small travel frictions and elevate the moments that matter.
index.feature1_desc: Sweet Park boasts an exceptional location, bringing all essential services together in the same building. You won't need to leave the complex for your daily needs; a pharmacy, laundry, barbershop, and supermarket are all conveniently located nearby, in addition to a variety of international and local restaurants.
index.feature2_desc: Enjoy an endless variety of international and local dining options just steps from your suite's door. The building is adjacent to renowned chains like Al Baik, McDonald's, and the long-established Al Bukhari restaurants, ensuring you and your family have access to hot and convenient meals anytime.
index.feature3_desc: We believe your time is valuable, so we offer an exclusive and complimentary service for our valued guests; our team will handle and deliver your purchases from Shops and amenities are conveniently located right next to your suite. Relax and leave the simple daily tasks to us.
index.feature4_desc: The Suite Park Hotel is centrally located on Jeddah's Corniche, offering easy access to all the city's attractions, including entertainment venues, modern hospitals, and historical sites. Its location is also conveniently close to the newly constructed Jeddah Central Stadium. Situated on the Corniche Road behind the Al Shasha Commercial Tower, the hotel enjoys excellent accessibility due to its proximity to King Abdul Aziz Road. Numerous large shopping malls are also nearby, and the airport is easily accessible.

room.hotel_size: Hotel size 200 rooms, Arranged over 6 floors
room.description_short: Simply elegant in all respects, this beautiful Parisian property offers a wonderful location that enhances your stay. Enjoy spacious rooms with great amenities and 6-star service from a superb team dedicated to making you feel like a VIP...
room.description_full: Simply elegant in all respects, this beautiful Parisian property offers a wonderful location that enhances your stay. Enjoy spacious rooms with great amenities and 6-star service from a superb team dedicated to making you feel like a VIP. Experience the pinnacle of luxury and comfort in our meticulously designed rooms.
room.description_extra: Our hotel features state-of-the-art facilities, world-class dining options, and exceptional concierge services. Whether you're here for business or pleasure, we ensure every moment of your stay exceeds expectations.
room.policies_subtitle: Lazur Hotel Apartments takes special requests - add in the next step!

policies_list.children_beds_details: Child policies: children of any age are welcome. To see correct prices and occupancy information, please add the number of children in your group and their ages to your search. Cot and extra bed policies: Cots and extra beds are not available at this property.
